title: Skill Config Declaration
description: Schema for a skill-level config.yaml file that declares shared and skill-specific configuration keys and whether the skill requires setup.

shared.description: Keys that should live in .agents/config/shared.yaml and be shared across skills.

skill.description: Keys that should live in .agents/config/{skill-name}.yaml and are specific to this skill.

requires_setup.description: Signals that the skill needs skill-specific initialization after installation.

key.description: Config key name, typically lowercase and dot-namespaced (e.g., agents.context_dir).

required.description: Whether the skill cannot function without a value for this key.

default.description: Default value used when the key is not provided.

type.description: Expected value type (e.g., string, boolean, integer, array, object).

description.description: Human-readable explanation of what the key controls.
